modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help with unpublishing a Google Site.

full_description_text: So, during our chat, the user was trying to figure out how to unpublish their Google Site. They seemed a bit lost on the steps and weren't sure what to do next. It was clear they needed some guidance on this process.
short_description: Need help with unpublishing a Google Site.
description: So, during our chat, the user was trying to figure out how to unpublish their Google Site. They seemed a bit lost on the steps and weren't sure what to do next. It was clear they needed some guidance on this process.
